text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black has been feeling tired, so I take her
to the infirmary so she can get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for making you worry, Trainer. I'll be
back on my feet before you can say lickety-split!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where... am I?

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Okay, welcome to the Intergalactic Karaoke
Showdown! Representing Earth, we have none
other than Kitasan Black!

text_block_list.name: Earth Fans
text_block_list.text:
You can do it, Kitasan! Your singing can make
miracles happen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thank you for your support! Hehe, I don't
know about making miracles happen, though...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
All right, if she can ring the bell, this planet's
destruction will be averted!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: WHAAAAA?!

text_block_list.name: Earth Fans
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan... You have to save us! Your singing is the
last hope for humankind!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm... our last hope...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Got it. I'll save the planet from the danger it
faces!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I always help people in need, and this time is no
different! Leave this to me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ding, dong, ding, dooong... Hehehe! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I saved the planet! Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black looks to be in tip-top condition
again after a good, long rest.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I always help people in need, and this time is no
different! Leave this to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Booong!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! What's happening?! I haven't even
started singing yet!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
H-hang on, give me one more chance! I Just need
one more shot!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Where am I? Oh, the infirmary... That
must've been a dream...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I wish they had at least let me sing before
disqualifying me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems a bad nightmare kept Kitasan Black from
getting enough rest.
